title: [Let's Do Addon] Fluids
description: Add fluids to the Let's Do series for even more modded usage !
body:
## [Let's Do Addon] Fluids
This add-on for the Let's Do series adds fluids for additional compatibility and modded usage.

Currently featured fluids:
* Vinery: all grapejuices
* NetherVinery: all grapejuices
* HerbalBrews: all teas
* Bakery: all jams
* Meadow: Milks, Rennet

Current recipes:
* Create Mixer:
  * 3 grapes for grape juice (Vinery)
  * Same recipe as tea kettle, using fluids instead (HerbalBrews)
  * Rennet (Meadow)
* Create Emptying/Filling:
  * Grapejuice bottles (Vinery)
  * Teas(HerbalBrews)
  * Jams with Jars and Jam Rolls (Bakery)
  * Milk buckets and Rennet (Meadow)
* Create Compacting:
  * Cheeses (Meadow)


Planned features:
* Recipes and fluids for Beachparty cocktails and milkshakes
* Recipes and fluids for HerbalBrews flasks

![Requires Botarium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b98d909f1e91d4a69f1d800b5bead87c855fba4.png)
![Requires Ressourceful Lib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/958859fc0faea10dd791ff02b81e986b1a0de8b1.png)
